message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

interface "SessionRepository" as SessionRepository << (I,#b7a7ff) >>
note top of SessionRepository
S extends Session
end note
SessionRepository : S createSession();
SessionRepository : void save(S session);
SessionRepository : S getSession(String id);
SessionRepository : void delete(String id);

interface "Session" as Session << (I,#b7a7ff) >>

class "MapSessionRepository" as MapSessionRepository << (C,#bfe6bf) >>

interface "FindByIndexNameSessionRepository" as FindByIndexNameSessionRepository << (I,#b7a7ff) >>
FindByIndexNameSessionRepository : Map<String, S> findByIndexNameAndIndexValue(String indexName, String indexValue);

interface "ExpiringSession" as ExpiringSession << (I,#b7a7ff) >>

class "JdbcOperationsSessionRepository" as JdbcOperationsSessionRepository << (C,#bfe6bf) >>
class "MongoOperationsSessionRepository" as MongoOperationsSessionRepository << (C,#bfe6bf) >>

class "RedisSession" as RedisSession << (C,#bfe6bf) >>

class "RedisOperationsSessionRepository" as RedisOperationsSessionRepository << (C,#bfe6bf) >>
note top of RedisOperationsSessionRepository
RedisSession
end note

SessionRepository --> Session

MapSessionRepository ..|> SessionRepository

ExpiringSession --|> Session

FindByIndexNameSessionRepository --|> SessionRepository

JdbcOperationsSessionRepository ..|> FindByIndexNameSessionRepository
MongoOperationsSessionRepository ..|> FindByIndexNameSessionRepository
RedisOperationsSessionRepository ..|> FindByIndexNameSessionRepository

RedisSession ..|> ExpiringSession
RedisSession --> RedisOperationsSessionRepository
@enduml
